subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon Truth! The surging ocean of grandeur hath swelled, and the dawn of guidance hath broken forth, and the kindled fire hath blazed forth in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بحق قد تلجلج طمطام الکبریاء و تبلج فجر الهدی و تاجج النار الموقده فی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun
